description: The screen content updates from a screen-sharing prompt to displaying the user's task instructions.
frame_description: The central text on the dark background changes to reveal the user's task: booking a return domestic flight on the Flight Centre website.

description: User pauses to read the task instructions as they are revealed on the screen.
Task instructions are being progressively revealed on the screen.
frame_description: A dark screen with white text displaying task instructions for a user research session.

description: User reads the task instructions on the Askable session page.
User clicks the "Open" button to start the flight booking task.
The browser navigates to the Flight Centre homepage.
The Flight Centre homepage content and search widget load.
User clicks on the "Where to?" input field to specify a destination.
User selects "Melbourne, Australia" from the destination suggestions.
User clicks on the date selection field, opening the "Travel dates" calendar modal.
User selects travel dates (March 20 to March 22) in the calendar modal
frame_description: The user interacts with the date picker, hovering over various dates before finalizing the selection of March 20th and 22nd.

description: User clicks the 'Done' button to confirm the selected travel dates
frame_description: The 'Done' button shows a visual click state as the user confirms their selection.

description: The travel dates modal closes and the main search form is updated with the selected dates
frame_description: The modal disappears and the search bar now displays 'Fri, 20 Mar - Sun, 22 Mar'.

description: User clicks the close button on the Honey rewards popup to dismiss it
page_title: Flight Centre - Your centre for travel

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Search flights' button
page_title: Flight Centre - Your centre for travel

description: User clicks the 'Search flights' button to initiate the search
page_title: Flight Centre - Your centre for travel

description: The page navigates from the home page to the flight search results page
frame_description: Transition from home page to search results via a loading screen

description: A loading screen is displayed with a spinner and cycling airline logos while results are being fetched
frame_description: Loading screen with message 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!'

description: User pauses to examine the flight search results for Adelaide to Melbourne
frame_description: Flight search results page showing various airline options and prices

description: User examines departing flight options from Adelaide (ADL) to Melbourne (MEL) on the results page.
frame_description: The user is viewing a list of available departing flights with various airlines and prices.

description: User clicks on the '$127' price button for the 6:10am Virgin Australia flight to view fare options.
The 'Select Departing Fare Type' section expands, showing Lite, Choice, and Flex fare options.
frame_description: A modal or expanded section appears showing different fare classes for the selected flight.

description: User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the 'Lite' fare type priced at $127.
A loading screen appears with the message 'Good choice! It's time to choose your flight for your return journey...'
frame_description: The screen transitions to a loading state with a spinner.

description: The page content updates to show return flight options from Melbourne (MEL) to Adelaide (ADL).
User examines the list of available return flights.
frame_description: The user is looking at return flight results, including Jetstar and Virgin Australia options.

description: User clicked the 'From $177' button for the 12:10pm flight to view fare options.
User clicked the 'SELECT' button for the 'Lite' fare type.
A loading screen appears with the message 'All Set! Now let's review your flight selections...'
The page navigates from the flight selection results to the 'Review trip' page.
User scrolls down the 'Review trip' page to view add-ons.
User scrolls down further to view the 'Seats' and 'Online Captain's Pack' sections.
User scrolls to the bottom of the page to find the continue button.
User clicked the green 'CONTINUE' button at the bottom of the review page.
A loading spinner appears with the message 'Thanks for confirming your flights' after the user clicked continue on the previous screen.
frame_description: Loading overlay visible on the baggage selection page.

description: The page navigates from the baggage results to the passenger details entry page.
frame_description: URL changes and the 'Travellers' page content loads, showing form fields for passenger information.

description: User pauses on the Travellers page, likely reading the 'Heads up!' warning message regarding personal details.
frame_description: The Travellers page is fully loaded and the user is examining the content.

description: User switches browser tabs to the Askable session page in response to a prompt.
frame_description: The active tab changes to the Askable session interface.

description: User is reading the prompt "What's making you hesitate there" on the Askable session page.
The prompt text updates to "Thank you for working through that. Shall we move on to the next part?"
User is reading the updated prompt "Thank you for working through that. Shall we move on to the next part?"
